title: ABP v1 hello_ack payload (Host -> Client)
description: Accept versions and SELECT one World Profile, inlining its document content-addressed by hash (§1, §4.2, §5.5). The client pins the profile by hash before use. Also advertises host info, optional host pubkey for pinning, and supported auth methods.

hash.description: Content hash over the canonical profile document, e.g. 'sha256-<base64url>'. The client recomputes and verifies before pinning (§5.5).

document.description: The inlined World Profile document. Validated against core/profile.json by the profile loader (F1.2), not by the Core envelope validator.

host_pubkey.description: Optional host public key for client-side pinning (§4.2).
